slack.description: Any interaction with the Slack API.

permissions.name: slack-read-all
permissions.description: All read operations across the entire Slack API, including messages, users, files, reactions, search, pins, bookmarks, reminders, thread subscriptions, and unread counts.

permissions.name: slack-write-all
permissions.description: All write operations across the entire Slack API, including sending messages, managing conversations, updating profiles, uploading files, marking thread subscriptions, and modifying pins, bookmarks, and reminders.

permissions.name: slack-auth-read
permissions.description: Check authentication status and list teams.

permissions.name: slack-auth-write
permissions.description: Revoke authentication tokens.

permissions.name: slack-chat-read
permissions.description: Get message permalinks and list scheduled messages.

permissions.name: slack-chat-write
permissions.description: Send, update, delete, and schedule messages.

permissions.name: slack-conversations-read
permissions.description: Read conversation history, details, members, and replies.

permissions.name: slack-conversations-write
permissions.description: Create, archive, rename, and manage conversations, including membership, invitations, topics, and purposes.

permissions.name: slack-users-read
permissions.description: Read user profiles, presence, identity, and look up users by email.

permissions.name: slack-users-write
permissions.description: Update user presence and profile information.

permissions.name: slack-files-read
permissions.description: List and inspect files, including remote files.

permissions.name: slack-files-write
permissions.description: Upload, delete, and share files, including remote files.

permissions.name: slack-reactions-read
permissions.description: List and inspect emoji reactions on messages.

permissions.name: slack-reactions-write
permissions.description: Add or remove emoji reactions.

permissions.name: slack-search
permissions.description: Search messages, files, and all content.

permissions.name: slack-pins-read
permissions.description: List pinned messages in a conversation.

permissions.name: slack-pins-write
permissions.description: Pin or unpin messages in a conversation.

permissions.name: slack-bookmarks-read
permissions.description: List bookmarks in a conversation.

permissions.name: slack-bookmarks-write
permissions.description: Add, edit, or remove bookmarks.

permissions.name: slack-reminders-read
permissions.description: List and inspect reminders.

permissions.name: slack-reminders-write
permissions.description: Create, complete, or delete reminders.

discord.description: Any request to the Discord API.

permissions.name: discord-read-all
permissions.description: Read any Discord resource.

permissions.name: discord-write-all
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete any Discord resource.

permissions.name: discord-read-messages
permissions.description: Read messages in Discord channels.

permissions.name: discord-write-messages
permissions.description: Send, edit, or delete messages in Discord channels.

permissions.name: discord-read-channels
permissions.description: Read Discord channel information.

permissions.name: discord-write-channels
permissions.description: Create, edit, or delete Discord channels.

permissions.name: discord-read-guilds
permissions.description: Read Discord server (guild) information.

permissions.name: discord-write-guilds
permissions.description: Create, edit, or delete Discord servers (guilds).

permissions.name: discord-read-users
permissions.description: Read Discord user information.

github.description: Any interaction with the GitHub REST API, excluding GraphQL.

permissions.name: github-read-all
permissions.description: Read any GitHub resource.

permissions.name: github-write-all
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete any GitHub resource.

permissions.name: github-read-repos
permissions.description: Read repository information and contents.

permissions.name: github-write-repos
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete repository resources.

permissions.name: github-read-issues
permissions.description: Read issues and issue details.

permissions.name: github-write-issues
permissions.description: Create, edit, or close issues.

permissions.name: github-read-pulls
permissions.description: Read pull requests and their details.

permissions.name: github-write-pulls
permissions.description: Create, edit, or merge pull requests.

permissions.name: github-read-gists
permissions.description: Read gists.

permissions.name: github-write-gists
permissions.description: Create, edit, or delete gists.

permissions.name: github-read-user
permissions.description: Read the authenticated user's profile and related information.

permissions.name: github-search
permissions.description: Search across GitHub repositories, code, issues, and users.

permissions.name: github-read-notifications
permissions.description: Read notifications.

permissions.name: github-write-notifications
permissions.description: Mark notifications as read or manage notification subscriptions.

github.description: Any Git protocol operation (clone, fetch, push) on GitHub.

permissions.name: github-git-read
permissions.description: Read-only Git operations on GitHub: clone and fetch.

permissions.name: github-git-write
permissions.description: Git push operations on GitHub.

permissions.name: gitlab-read-all
permissions.description: Any read-only action on GitLab.

permissions.name: gitlab-write-all
permissions.description: Any write action on GitLab.

permissions.name: gitlab-read-projects
permissions.description: List or view GitLab projects.

permissions.name: gitlab-write-projects
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete GitLab projects.

permissions.name: gitlab-read-repository
permissions.description: View repository contents, branches, tags, and commits on GitLab.

permissions.name: gitlab-write-repository
permissions.description: Modify repository contents, branches, tags, or commits on GitLab.

permissions.name: gitlab-read-merge-requests
permissions.description: List or view merge requests on GitLab.

permissions.name: gitlab-write-merge-requests
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete merge requests on GitLab.

permissions.name: gitlab-read-issues
permissions.description: List or view issues on GitLab.

permissions.name: gitlab-write-issues
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete issues on GitLab.

permissions.name: gitlab-read-pipelines
permissions.description: View CI/CD pipelines and jobs on GitLab.

permissions.name: gitlab-write-pipelines
permissions.description: Run, retry, or cancel CI/CD pipelines and jobs on GitLab.

permissions.name: gitlab-read-users
permissions.description: View user profiles and information on GitLab.

permissions.name: gitlab-read-groups
permissions.description: List or view groups on GitLab.

permissions.name: gitlab-write-groups
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete groups on GitLab.

gitlab.description: Git operations (clone, fetch, push) on GitLab repositories.

permissions.name: gitlab-git-read
permissions.description: Read-only Git operations (clone, fetch) on GitLab repositories.

permissions.name: gitlab-git-write
permissions.description: Git push operations on GitLab repositories.

permissions.name: dropbox-files
permissions.description: Any Dropbox file operations.

permissions.name: dropbox-files-read
permissions.description: Read-only Dropbox file operations such as listing, downloading, searching, and exporting files.

permissions.name: dropbox-files-write
permissions.description: Dropbox file modifications such as copying, moving, uploading, deleting, and organizing files and folders.

permissions.name: dropbox-sharing
permissions.description: Any Dropbox sharing operations.

permissions.name: dropbox-sharing-read
permissions.description: Read-only Dropbox sharing operations such as checking permissions and listing shared items.

permissions.name: dropbox-sharing-write
permissions.description: Dropbox sharing modifications such as creating, updating, and revoking shared links and folder memberships.

permissions.name: dropbox-account
permissions.description: Dropbox user account information.

permissions.name: dropbox-file-requests
permissions.description: Dropbox file request operations.

permissions.name: dropbox-contacts
permissions.description: Dropbox contacts operations.

linear.description: All requests to the Linear API.

notion.description: Any request to the Notion API.

permissions.name: notion-read-all
permissions.description: Read any Notion content, including searching across all resources.

permissions.name: notion-write-all
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete any Notion content.

permissions.name: notion-read-pages
permissions.description: Read Notion pages and their properties.

permissions.name: notion-write-pages
permissions.description: Create or update Notion pages.

permissions.name: notion-read-blocks
permissions.description: Read Notion blocks (the content elements within pages).

permissions.name: notion-write-blocks
permissions.description: Update or delete Notion blocks.

permissions.name: notion-read-databases
permissions.description: Read Notion databases and their schemas.

permissions.name: notion-write-databases
permissions.description: Create or update Notion databases.

permissions.name: notion-query-databases
permissions.description: Query a Notion database to retrieve filtered and sorted entries.

permissions.name: notion-read-users
permissions.description: List or retrieve Notion workspace users.

permissions.name: notion-read-comments
permissions.description: Read comments on Notion pages or blocks.

permissions.name: notion-write-comments
permissions.description: Add comments to Notion pages or blocks.

permissions.name: notion-search
permissions.description: Search across all Notion pages and databases.

notion-mcp.description: Any request to Notion's hosted MCP endpoint (mcp.notion.com).

permissions.name: notion-mcp-session
permissions.description: Open and maintain an MCP session: initialize, list tools/prompts/resources, ping, and send notifications. Required for any MCP client to function; does not read or modify Notion content.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-read-all
permissions.description: Run any read-only Notion MCP tool (search, fetch, queries, list comments/teams, bot info) plus the MCP session handshake.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-write-all
permissions.description: Run any Notion MCP tool that creates or modifies content (create/update pages, databases, views, data sources, comments; move/duplicate pages) plus the MCP session handshake.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-search
permissions.description: Search across the Notion workspace and connected sources.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-fetch
permissions.description: Retrieve the content of a Notion page, database, or data source by URL or ID.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-query-data-sources
permissions.description: Query across one or more Notion data sources with filters, grouping, and summaries.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-query-database-view
permissions.description: Query a Notion database using a predefined view's filters and sorts.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-get-comments
permissions.description: List comments and discussions on a Notion page.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-get-teams
permissions.description: List the teams (teamspaces) in the current Notion workspace.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-get-users
permissions.description: List all users in the Notion workspace, or retrieve a single user by ID (the notion-get-users and notion-get-user tools).

permissions.name: notion-mcp-get-self
permissions.description: Retrieve information about the connected bot user and workspace.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-create-pages
permissions.description: Create one or more Notion pages with properties and content.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-update-page
permissions.description: Update a Notion page's properties, content, icon, or cover.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-move-pages
permissions.description: Move one or more Notion pages or databases to a new parent.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-duplicate-page
permissions.description: Duplicate a Notion page within the workspace.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-create-database
permissions.description: Create a new Notion database, data source, and initial view.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-update-data-source
permissions.description: Update a Notion data source's properties, name, or description.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-create-view
permissions.description: Create a new view on a Notion database.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-update-view
permissions.description: Update a Notion view's name, filters, sorts, or display configuration.

permissions.name: notion-mcp-create-comment
permissions.description: Add a comment to a Notion page or specific block.

permissions.name: zoom-write-all

permissions.name: zoom-write-recordings

permissions.name: zoom-write-users

permissions.name: telegram-bot-info

permissions.name: telegram-stickers

permissions.name: telegram-payments
permissions.description: Send invoices, handle shipping and checkout queries, and manage Telegram Star payments and subscriptions.

permissions.name: umami-write-teams

permissions.name: umami-read-me
permissions.description: View the current user's profile information.

google-gmail.description: Any request to the Gmail API.

permissions.name: google-gmail-read-all
permissions.description: Read anything from Gmail.

permissions.name: google-gmail-write-all
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete anything in Gmail.

permissions.name: google-gmail-read-messages
permissions.description: List or read messages.

permissions.name: google-gmail-write-messages
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete messages, including uploads.

permissions.name: google-gmail-send-messages
permissions.description: Send messages, including uploads.

permissions.name: google-gmail-read-threads
permissions.description: List or read threads.

permissions.name: google-gmail-write-threads
permissions.description: Modify or delete threads.

permissions.name: google-gmail-read-labels
permissions.description: List or read labels.

permissions.name: google-gmail-write-labels
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete labels.

permissions.name: google-gmail-read-drafts
permissions.description: List or read drafts.

permissions.name: google-gmail-write-drafts
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete drafts, including uploads.

permissions.name: google-gmail-read-settings
permissions.description: Read account settings such as filters, forwarding, and IMAP/POP configuration.

permissions.name: google-gmail-write-settings
permissions.description: Change account settings such as filters, forwarding, and IMAP/POP configuration.

permissions.name: google-gmail-read-history
permissions.description: Read mailbox change history.

permissions.name: google-gmail-read-profile
permissions.description: Read the user's Gmail profile.

google-calendar.description: Identify requests to the Google Calendar API.

permissions.name: google-calendar-read-all
permissions.description: Read any Google Calendar resource.

permissions.name: google-calendar-write-all
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete any Google Calendar resource.

permissions.name: google-calendar-read-events
permissions.description: Read events from calendars.

permissions.name: google-calendar-write-events
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete events on calendars.

permissions.name: google-calendar-read-calendars
permissions.description: Read calendar details.

permissions.name: google-calendar-write-calendars
permissions.description: Create, update, delete, or clear calendars.

permissions.name: google-calendar-read-calendar-list
permissions.description: Read the user's list of calendars.

permissions.name: google-calendar-write-calendar-list
permissions.description: Add, update, or remove calendars from the user's calendar list.

permissions.name: google-calendar-read-settings
permissions.description: Read the user's calendar settings.

permissions.name: google-calendar-read-acl
permissions.description: Read access control rules on calendars.

permissions.name: google-calendar-write-acl
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete access control rules on calendars.

permissions.name: google-calendar-query-freebusy
permissions.description: Query free/busy information for calendars.

permissions.name: google-calendar-read-colors
permissions.description: Read available calendar and event colors.

google-drive.description: Any request to the Google Drive API.

permissions.name: google-drive-read-all
permissions.description: Read anything from Google Drive.

permissions.name: google-drive-write-all
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete anything in Google Drive.

permissions.name: google-drive-read-files
permissions.description: List files or retrieve file metadata.

permissions.name: google-drive-write-files
permissions.description: Create, upload, update, or delete files.

permissions.name: google-drive-read-permissions
permissions.description: View sharing permissions on files.

permissions.name: google-drive-write-permissions
permissions.description: Share, modify, or revoke sharing permissions on files.

permissions.name: google-drive-read-comments
permissions.description: View comments and replies on files.

permissions.name: google-drive-write-comments
permissions.description: Add, edit, or delete comments and replies on files.

permissions.name: google-drive-read-about
permissions.description: Retrieve information about the user's Drive account and settings.

google-docs.description: Any request to the Google Docs API.

permissions.name: google-docs-read-all
permissions.description: Read any Google Docs resource.

permissions.name: google-docs-write-all
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete any Google Docs resource.

permissions.name: google-docs-read-documents
permissions.description: Read a specific document.

permissions.name: google-docs-write-documents
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete documents.

permissions.name: google-docs-create-documents
permissions.description: Create new documents.

permissions.name: google-docs-update-documents
permissions.description: Apply batch updates to a document's content.

google-sheets.description: Any request to the Google Sheets API.

permissions.name: google-sheets-read-all
permissions.description: Read anything from Google Sheets.

permissions.name: google-sheets-write-all
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete anything in Google Sheets.

permissions.name: google-sheets-read-spreadsheets
permissions.description: Read spreadsheet metadata (title, sheets, properties, etc.).

permissions.name: google-sheets-create-spreadsheets
permissions.description: Create new spreadsheets.

permissions.name: google-sheets-update-spreadsheets
permissions.description: Modify spreadsheet structure or formatting via batch updates.

permissions.name: google-sheets-read-values
permissions.description: Read cell values from a spreadsheet.

permissions.name: google-sheets-write-values
permissions.description: Write or append cell values in a spreadsheet.

google-people.description: Any request to the Google People API.

permissions.name: google-people-read-all
permissions.description: Read anything from the Google People API.

permissions.name: google-people-write-all
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete anything in the Google People API.

permissions.name: google-people-read-contacts
permissions.description: List or read contacts.

permissions.name: google-people-write-contacts
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete contacts.

permissions.name: google-people-read-contact-groups
permissions.description: List or read contact groups.

permissions.name: google-people-write-contact-groups
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete contact groups.

permissions.name: google-people-read-other-contacts
permissions.description: List or read other contacts (contacts outside the user's address book).

permissions.name: google-people-write-other-contacts
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete other contacts (contacts outside the user's address book).

google-analytics.description: Any request to the Google Analytics API (data and admin endpoints).

permissions.name: google-analytics-read-all
permissions.description: Read-only access to all Google Analytics resources.

permissions.name: google-analytics-write-all
permissions.description: Write access to all Google Analytics resources.

permissions.name: google-analytics-run-reports
permissions.description: Run analytics reports, including standard, pivot, real-time, batch, compatibility, and access reports.

permissions.name: google-analytics-read-metadata
permissions.description: Read metadata (available dimensions and metrics) for an analytics property.

permissions.name: google-analytics-read-accounts
permissions.description: List or view Google Analytics accounts and account summaries.

permissions.name: google-analytics-read-properties
permissions.description: List or view Google Analytics properties.

permissions.name: google-analytics-write-properties
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete Google Analytics properties.

permissions.name: google-analytics-read-data-streams
permissions.description: List or view data streams for a Google Analytics property.

permissions.name: google-analytics-write-data-streams
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete data streams for a Google Analytics property.

google-directions.description: Matches all Google Routes API traffic.

permissions.name: google-directions-read-all
permissions.description: Read any Google Directions data.

permissions.name: google-directions-write-all
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete any Google Directions data.

permissions.name: google-directions-compute-routes
permissions.description: Compute routes between locations.

permissions.name: google-directions-compute-route-matrix
permissions.description: Compute a distance and duration matrix between multiple origins and destinations.

ramp.description: Any interaction with the Ramp API.

permissions.name: ramp-read-all
permissions.description: Read anything from Ramp: every read capability across all resources (transactions, cards, bills, reimbursements, treasury, vendors, users, accounting, trips, limits, and more). Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities.

permissions.name: ramp-write-all
permissions.description: Create or modify anything in Ramp: every write capability across all resources (activate/lock cards, approve transactions & reimbursements, edit limits, issue funds, manage trips & vendors, pay via x402, and more). Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities.

permissions.name: ramp-read-accounting
permissions.description: Read accounting / analyst queries. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: execute analyst query, get analyst artifact status, get analyst catalog, get analyst metric metadata, get analyst spend facts domain docs, get analyst table domain docs, get tracking categories, get tracking category options.

permissions.name: ramp-read-ai-spend
permissions.description: Read AI token spend. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: get ai token spend aggregates, get ai token spend connections, get ai token spend current spend, get ai token spend filter options.

permissions.name: ramp-read-bills
permissions.description: Read bills. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: get bill amount summary, get bill comments, get bill details, get bill history, get bill invoices, get bill metrics, get bill status, get bills for approval, get draft bill details, get recurring bill, list bills, search bills.

permissions.name: ramp-read-cards
permissions.description: Read cards. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: enroll business in agent cards, get agent card creds, get agent card funds.

permissions.name: ramp-read-help-center
permissions.description: Read Ramp help-center articles. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: search help center snippets.

permissions.name: ramp-read-limits
permissions.description: Read spend limits & allocations. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: get funds, list cards.

permissions.name: ramp-read-memos
permissions.description: Read transaction memos. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: get transaction suggested memos.

permissions.name: ramp-read-purchase-orders
permissions.description: Read purchase orders. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: get purchase order details, search purchase orders.

permissions.name: ramp-read-reimbursements
permissions.description: Read out-of-pocket reimbursements. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: estimate mileage reimbursement, estimate per diem amount, get outstanding reimbursements by currency, get reimbursement receipts, get reimbursements, get reimbursements for approval, get user recent reimbursements, search reimbursements, search user reimbursements.

permissions.name: ramp-read-tasks
permissions.description: Read attention feed / tasks. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: get attention feed.

permissions.name: ramp-read-transactions
permissions.description: Read card transactions. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: answer policy question, get decline explanation, get full transaction metadata, get transaction missing items, get transactions.

permissions.name: ramp-read-treasury
permissions.description: Read treasury / business account balances. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: get account balance history, get investment account balance, get managed portfolio account balance, get ramp business account balance, get treasury balance history, list business accounts, list treasury accounts, list wallet transfers.

permissions.name: ramp-read-trips
permissions.description: Read travel & trips. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: get bookings, get candidate trips for transaction, get flight booking locations, get traveler profile, get user trips, search flights, submit flight booking.

permissions.name: ramp-read-unified-requests
permissions.description: Read unified requests (approvals inbox). Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: get requests to review, get unified request details, search unified requests.

permissions.name: ramp-read-users
permissions.description: Read users & org chart. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: get org chart, get simplified user detail, list users, search user.

permissions.name: ramp-read-vendors
permissions.description: Read vendors. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: get vendor agreement, get vendor document bulk status, list vendor agreements, search vendors.

permissions.name: ramp-write-approvals
permissions.description: Create or modify approval decisions. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: approve or reject request.

permissions.name: ramp-write-cards
permissions.description: Create or modify cards. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: activate card, lock or unlock card.

permissions.name: ramp-write-comments
permissions.description: Create or modify comments. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: post comment.

permissions.name: ramp-write-funds
permissions.description: Create or modify agent-card funds. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: issue one off funds.

permissions.name: ramp-write-limits
permissions.description: Create or modify spend limits & allocations. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: limit increase, lock or unlock spend allocation, lock or unlock spend allocation member, update category restrictions, update merchant restrictions, update transaction amount limit.

permissions.name: ramp-write-receipts
permissions.description: Create or modify receipts. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: attach receipt to transaction, mark transaction missing receipt, provide no receipt reason, upload receipt file.

permissions.name: ramp-write-reimbursements
permissions.description: Create or modify out-of-pocket reimbursements. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: approve or reject reimbursement, cancel reimbursement payment, create reimbursement from receipt, duplicate reimbursement, edit reimbursement, resubmit reimbursement, submit reimbursement.

permissions.name: ramp-write-transactions
permissions.description: Create or modify card transactions. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: approve or reject transaction, edit transaction, request transaction repayment.

permissions.name: ramp-write-trips
permissions.description: Create or modify travel & trips. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: create trip, update traveler profile.

permissions.name: ramp-write-vendors
permissions.description: Create or modify vendors. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: attach vendor document, bulk upload vendor documents.

permissions.name: ramp-write-x402
permissions.description: Create or modify x402 protocol payments. Limited to Ramp's agent-tools capabilities. Includes: pay with x402.

todoist.description: Any request to the Todoist API.

permissions.name: todoist-read-all
permissions.description: Read anything from Todoist.

permissions.name: todoist-write-all
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete anything in Todoist.

permissions.name: todoist-read-projects
permissions.description: Read projects, including collaborators, search, and archived projects.

permissions.name: todoist-write-projects
permissions.description: Create, update, delete, archive, or unarchive projects.

permissions.name: todoist-read-sections
permissions.description: Read sections, including search.

permissions.name: todoist-write-sections
permissions.description: Create, update, delete, archive, or unarchive sections.

permissions.name: todoist-read-tasks
permissions.description: Read tasks, including filters and completed tasks.

permissions.name: todoist-write-tasks
permissions.description: Create, update, delete, or quick-add tasks (not completion — see todoist-complete-tasks).

permissions.name: todoist-complete-tasks
permissions.description: Close, reopen, or move tasks without creating, updating, or deleting them.

permissions.name: todoist-read-comments
permissions.description: Read comments on tasks and projects.

permissions.name: todoist-write-comments
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete comments.

permissions.name: todoist-read-labels
permissions.description: Read personal and shared labels, including search.

permissions.name: todoist-write-labels
permissions.description: Create, update, or delete personal labels and manage shared labels.

permissions.name: todoist-sync
permissions.description: Use the batched Sync endpoint (reads and writes in a single request).
